title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Cancel
scenario: Fit Test returns to Device Settings screen after failing or cancelling on the 2nd screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a device that supports Fit Test connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
5. On the 2nd screen of the Fit Test, either fail the test or tap "Cancel".
6. Verify the Fit Test screen closes and the user returns to the Device Settings screen.
7. Tap "Cancel" again to confirm the behavior.
expected: The Fit Test screen closes and the user returns to the Device Settings screen. Tapping Cancel again confirms consistent behavior.
